name: SCIENTIFIC ENERGY, INC
summary: Scientific Energy, Inc. is a Utah-incorporated company operating primarily through subsidiaries in food ordering and delivery (Macau, via Aomi App), graphite product sales (via Graphite Energy, Inc.), and physical gold trading (via 50%-owned Gold Gold Gold Limited in Hong Kong). Its flagship subsidiary MED holds approximately 70% market share in Macau food delivery, generating over 10 million transactions and ~$141.4M gross merchandise volume in 2024.

products.name: Aomi App
products.description: Mobile food and grocery ordering and delivery platform operating in Macau connecting merchants, consumers, and delivery riders.

products.name: WeChat Mini Program
products.description: Third-party mini app integration allowing customers to access Aomi platform services without a separate download.

products.name: Goldeck App
products.description: Physical gold trading platform offering one-stop services including gold trading, deposits, and withdrawals in Hong Kong.

products.name: Graphite Sales Business
products.description: Graphite ore and product sales business operated by wholly-owned subsidiary Graphite Energy, Inc., incorporated in Florida.

products.name: Flash Sales Service
products.description: Limited-time deep-discount sales on the Aomi platform allowing merchants to clear inventory to exclusive members.

products.name: In-Store Service
products.description: Online-to-offline service where users find store deals online and redeem them at physical locations for dining, entertainment, and more.

products.name: Group Dining Services (Hong Kong)
products.description: Corporate group dining platform in Hong Kong offering meal delivery and physical Webite Space dining locations.

products.name: Webite Space
products.description: Physical shared kitchen-and-cafe locations in Hong Kong offering meal selections; 4 locations opened by end of 2024.

partnerships.description: 50-50 joint venture established in 2018 to operate Gold Gold Gold Limited (3G), a physical gold trading platform in Hong Kong.
Base Agreement for Purchase of Graphite Ore signed January 2024 to ensure long-term graphite ore supply, amended March 2024.
MED was Meituan Dianping's exclusive business partner in Macau in 2015.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
